metadata.title: AI Warfare Capability Breakthrough Timeline
metadata.description: Major milestones in military AI development from 2023-2026

timeline.title: DoD Task Force Lima Established
timeline.significance: Capstone event - Foundation for Generative AI in national security
timeline.description: DoD chartered Task Force Lima to study and guide Generative AI applications for national security

timeline.title: Replicator Program Launch
timeline.significance: Major initiative - Accelerating attritable autonomous capabilities
timeline.description: Replicator began naming and accelerating 'attritable autonomous' capabilities across DoD

timeline.title: Maven Smart System Prototype
timeline.description: $480M Maven Smart System prototype contract establishes expansion/production pathway for AI targeting

timeline.title: Roadrunner Interceptor Contract
timeline.significance: Funding milestone - $250M recoverable interceptor for counter-drone operations
timeline.description: Roadrunner recoverable interceptor receives major Pentagon contract for autonomous counter-UAS

timeline.title: CCA Designations: YFQ-42A & YFQ-44A
timeline.significance: Autonomy milestone - Formal CCA program commencement
timeline.description: USAF formally designates YFQ-42A (General Atomics) and YFQ-44A (Anduril) as Collaborative Combat Aircraft prototypes

timeline.title: NATO Maven Smart System Acquisition
timeline.significance: International milestone - All allied command intelligence fusion
timeline.description: NATO acquires Maven Smart System for Allied Command Operations - intelligence fusion and accelerated decision-making

timeline.title: USMC Counter-Drone Contract
timeline.description: Anduril wins major US Marine Corps base protection counter-UAS contract

timeline.title: Centaur AI Agent Fighter Integration
timeline.significance: Autonomy milestone - AI agent in operational fighter jet
timeline.description: AI agent 'Centaur' flew integrated in Gripen E fighter - Project Beyond demonstration with disabled C2 data

timeline.title: DoD Frontier AI Prototype Deals
timeline.significance: Funding milestone - $200M to OpenAI, $200M ceilings to others for agentic workflows
timeline.description: DoD awards prototype OTAs for agentic AI focused on planning, analysis, and bounded actions

timeline.title: 33,000 AI Strike Kits for Ukraine
timeline.significance: Scale deployment - DoD-funded contract for visually-navigating strike drones
timeline.description: Massive deployment of AI strike kits using visual navigation for GPS-denied operations in active conflict

timeline.title: Ghost Shark Undersea Fleet Commitment
timeline.significance: Funding milestone - A$1.7B for XL-AUV fleet undersea warfare
timeline.description: Australia commits to five-year Ghost Shark Extra-Large Autonomous Undersea Vehicle fleet acquisition

timeline.title: Directed Energy Counter-Swarm Mobile
timeline.significance: Capability milestone - Mobile robotic directed-energy counter-UAS
timeline.description: Leonidas high-power microwave combined with autonomous platform for swarm defense

timeline.title: Shield AI CCA Mission Autonomy Selection
timeline.significance: Autonomy milestone - Software-defined mission autonomy for CCA
timeline.description: Shield AI selected as mission autonomy provider for USAF Collaborative Combat Aircraft program; Hivemind integrated on Anduril Fury (YFQ-44A)

timeline.title: $20B Army Counter-Drone Contract
timeline.significance: Funding milestone - Largest AI C2 contract in history
timeline.description: U.S. Army selected Anduril Lattice as C2 backbone under 10-year up-to-$20B contract vehicle; first task order $87M

timeline.title: Autonomous Counter-Drone Truck
timeline.significance: Capability milestone - Self-driving + directed energy integration
timeline.description: Autonomous counter-drone truck combining Kodiak self-driving with Epirus microwave system
